milestones.name: Foundation
milestones.description: The 12-stage workflow engine and the Obsidian plugin that wraps it into a ready-to-use experience. The full process — from idea to shipped software — is available today.

milestones.label: roadmap:v3
milestones.name: Composable Runtime
milestones.description: The workflow engine and AI agent library become available as standalone packages. Developers can embed the full Specorator methodology into their own tools and applications — no Obsidian plugin required.

milestones.label: roadmap:v4
milestones.name: Intelligence Layer
milestones.description: The ecosystem learns from every project. Decisions are tracked, patterns surfaced, and guidance improves over time — the more you use it, the smarter it gets.
